title: Emmanuel Katto : Tracking Days Since Status Change in Salesforce-Integrated Boards

posts.author: emmanuelkatto23 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone, I’m Emmanuel Katto, looking to implement a system where, upon a status change (e.g., from “Not Started” to “In Progress”) in our Salesforce-integrated board, a column begins counting the number of days since that change occurred. This will help us monitor the duration an item remains in a particular status.

Has anyone implemented a similar setup or have alternative suggestions? Are there best practices or potential pitfalls to be aware of when configuring this in an integrated environment?

Regards
Emmanuel Katto
